title: Diagnosis Coding: Using the ICD-10-CM
description: Learn to identify ICD-10-CM structure and format, recognize key features, and find the right diagnosis codes. Free web-based training updated September 2025. 60-minute contact hours.

title: Procedure Coding: Using the ICD-10-PCS
description: Understand the ICD-10-PCS system structure, table format, and coding conventions for inpatient procedure coding. Free web-based training updated September 2025. 60-minute contact hours.

title: Medicare Billing: 837I & Form CMS-1450
description: Covers institutional claim submission using the 837I electronic transaction and the CMS-1450 paper form. Includes required data elements, common errors, and Medicare billing rules. Updated July 2025. 90-minute contact hours.

title: Combating Medicare Parts C and D Fraud, Waste & Abuse
description: Required training covering how to identify, prevent, and report fraud, waste, and abuse in Medicare Parts C and D programs. Updated July 2025. 30-minute contact hours.

title: World of Medicare
description: Comprehensive overview of the Medicare program including Parts A, B, C, and D, Medigap, eligibility, enrollment, and coverage. A foundational course for anyone new to Medicare billing. Updated December 2024. 90-minute contact hours.

title: SNF Consolidated Billing
description: Explains Skilled Nursing Facility consolidated billing requirements, which services are included in the SNF PPS payment, and how to handle ancillary services correctly. Updated March 2024. 60-minute contact hours.

title: 2026 Medicare Part C and Part D Reporting Requirements and Data Validation
description: Covers the 2026 reporting requirements, data validation procedures, and compliance expectations for Medicare Advantage (Part C) and Prescription Drug Plan (Part D) organizations. Published March 2026. 120-minute contact hours.

title: CMS National Provider Calls & Webcasts
description: Live educational teleconferences and webcasts hosted by CMS on Medicare policy, billing updates, and compliance topics. AAPC accepts the registration confirmation email as proof of attendance in place of a certificate. 1 CEU per hour of attendance.

title: Healthcare Business Monthly — Monthly CEU Quiz
description: Earn 1 CEU per month by completing the quiz in AAPC's Healthcare Business Monthly magazine. Covers coding updates, compliance news, and industry topics. Available via the AAPC Content app or online. Quizzes expire 12 months after publish date.

title: AAPC Free Quarterly CEU Webinars
description: AAPC hosts free live webinars each quarter on rotating coding and compliance topics. Each session awards 1 CEU toward any AAPC credential. Check the AAPC events calendar for upcoming dates and topics.

title: AAPC Local Chapter Meetings
description: Earn 1 CEU per hour of education at any AAPC local chapter meeting. With 500+ chapters across the US, local meetings are one of the easiest ways to earn free CEUs while networking with other coders. Check the AAPC website to find your local chapter calendar.

title: Non-Vascular Interventional Radiology Coding Seminar
description: Half-day specialty seminar covering non-vascular IR coding including drainage procedures, biopsies, ablations, and vertebroplasty. Available as a standalone session or as part of the larger Las Vegas coding conference. Also approved for 4.0 ASRT CEUs.

title: Peripheral Vascular Diagnostic and Interventional Coding Seminar
description: Intensive two-day seminar covering catheter placements, diagnostic angiography, peripheral interventional procedures, and endovascular surgery coding. One of the most comprehensive vascular coding courses available. Also approved for 15.0 ASRT CEUs.

title: ZHealth eLearning Courses — IR & Cardiology Modules
description: Self-paced online modules covering interventional radiology and cardiology coding topics. Post-test required to earn credit. Starting at $25 per module — ZHealth Online members get 10% off. Modules expire at end of calendar year.

title: ZHealth Medical Coding Webinars — IR, Cardiology & Vascular
description: 90–120 minute web-based presentations on interventional radiology, cardiology, and vascular surgery coding. Post-test required to receive CEU certificate. Check site for current available topics and pricing.

title: ZHealth Las Vegas Coding Seminar — June 2026
description: Multi-day specialty coding conference at Caesars Palace, Las Vegas covering interventional radiology, cardiology, electrophysiology, and vascular surgery. Choose individual half-day sessions or the full conference. Earn up to 27.5 AAPC CEUs. Sessions available live in-person and virtual.

title: AMBA Free CEU Webinar Series
description: Regular series of free live webinars covering medical billing, compliance, Medicare updates, and coding topics. Open to members and non-members. 1 CEU per webinar. All CMS webinars and teleconferences are also pre-approved for AMBA CEUs. Register on the AMBA website for upcoming dates.

title: Denial Resolution and Management Course
description: Learn to identify, analyze, and resolve denied claims to ensure timely reimbursement. Covers the full revenue cycle, CMS-1500 completion, EOB review, denial types, appeal strategies, and root cause analysis.

title: Intro to AI Concepts for Medical Billing and Coding
description: Learn how AI, natural language processing, and machine learning are transforming medical coding and billing workflows. Covers ethical considerations, data privacy, and future trends. Free for AAPC members.

title: Advanced ICD-10-CM Code Set Training
description: Advance your ICD-10-CM skills with clinical concepts for commonly treated conditions across 12 body systems. Covers outpatient coding guidelines, coding conventions, neoplasms, pregnancy, and more. Basic ICD-10-CM knowledge recommended.

title: Certified Evaluation and Management Coder (CEMC) Online Training Course
description: Master E/M coding guidelines including MDM, time-based leveling, modifiers, and Medicare billing rules. Covers NCCI, ICD-10-CM, and CPT rules for office, outpatient, hospital, and consultation services. Recommended for coders with 2+ years of E/M experience.

title: Dental Billing and Coding Course
description: Master CDT, CPT, ICD-10-CM, and HCPCS Level II coding for dental services. Covers dental anatomy, cross coding, claim forms, revenue cycle, and compliance. Ideal for dental coders, billers, hygienists, and medical coders expanding into dentistry.

title: Credentialing Specialist Course
description: Learn the end-to-end provider credentialing process including applications, documentation requirements, payer enrollment, and tracking re-credentialing over time. No prerequisites required.

title: Electronic Health Record and Electronic Medical Record Systems Course
description: Understand EHR and EMR navigation, template development, regulatory considerations, best practices, and common misuses. Learn how to provide feedback to providers to improve clinical documentation. No prerequisites required.

title: Healthcare Informatics Course
description: Explore how data is gathered and used to improve healthcare delivery. Covers patient intake, EHR introduction, database storage, security, predictive modeling, and reporting. No prerequisites required.

title: Home Health Coding Course
description: Learn the ins and outs of home health coding under the Patient-Driven Groupings Model (PDGM). Covers ICD-10-CM guidelines for home health, OASIS-D, clinical episode management, and reimbursement impact. Recommended for coders with 1+ year of coding experience.

title: Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation Coding Course
description: Learn CPT, ICD-10-CM, and E/M coding for physical therapy, occupational therapy, and rehabilitation services. Includes HCPCS Level II codes, modifiers, and real-world case studies. Recommended for coders with 1+ year of pro-fee coding experience.

title: Revenue Cycle Management Course
description: Get an in-depth introduction to healthcare revenue cycle management. Covers patient registration, claims processing, denial management, reimbursement, KPIs, and the soft skills needed to succeed as an RCM professional. No prerequisites required.

title: Skilled Nursing Facility Coding Course
description: Master ICD-10-CM, E/M, and CPT coding for skilled nursing facility services. Covers the Patient Driven Payment Model (PDPM), MDS 3.0, consolidated billing, Medicare Part A, and real-world case studies. Recommended for coders with 1+ year of coding experience.

title: Decision Health Free CEU Quizzes
description: Create a free account to access multiple short quizzes, each worth 0.5 CEUs toward your CPC renewal. Covers a variety of coding and compliance topics. No cost — just create an account and start earning credit.
